scenarios.label: Great Lakes Upper Midwest pike lake July stained windy/reaction
scenarios.expected: Windy summer lake should show reaction/baitfish tools, pike jerkbaits/swimbaits/bucktails, and large pike streamers without surface leakage.

scenarios.label: Great Lakes Upper Midwest pike lake July clear calm/surface-open
scenarios.expected: Clear calm summer lake should allow surface and pike-specific baitfish tools without forcing topwater every day.
review_flags: pike surface fly product review: frog_fly

scenarios.label: Great Lakes Upper Midwest pike river July stained
scenarios.expected: Summer river should stay river-valid while showing pike baitfish/reaction tools and big streamers.

scenarios.label: Great Lakes Upper Midwest pike lake April clear shoulder season
scenarios.expected: Shoulder-season lake should still feel like pike: jerkbait/spinner/spoon/swimbait/blade and pike streamers are expected.

scenarios.label: Great Lakes Upper Midwest pike lake January cold
scenarios.expected: Cold pike can be narrower and deeper/slower, but should not lose pike identity entirely.
review_flags: no dedicated pike fly candidates appeared
questionable/shared small-profile lure bucket appears nearly every day
